arts.ttl: Everton v Chelsea: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Everton v Chelsea: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Dyche backed by Friedkin Group but accepts Everton results must improve
arts.sum: Everton manager met new owners for first meeting Dyche: ‘You’ve got to win games, that doesn’t change’ Sean Dyche said he received the Friedkin Group’s backing in his first meeting with Everton’s new owners but admits he must deliver an improved second half of the season to remain part of their long-term plans. The Everton manager met the club’s new executive chairman, Marc Watts, on Friday following the completion of TFG’s takeover the previous day. Watts spent approximately 45 minutes with Dyche and addressed the entire playing squad while on a tour of the facilities at the club’s Finch Farm training ground. He will be among TFG’s representatives at Everton’s home game against Chelsea on Sunday. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche makes honest admission on new contract after Everton takeover
arts.sum: Sean Dyche's Everton contract expires in July and he does not know the long-term plans of new owners, The Friedkin Group - but he says he is proud of what he has achieved at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca DOES have Chelsea in the Premier League title race and their attack is a force to be reckoned with - even if he insists they are not ready to challenge, writes MARTIN KEOWN
arts.sum: MARTIN KEOWN: Sorry Enzo Maresca and Co, but we aren't buying the baloney you're selling. You are contenders, 100 per cent.

arts.ttl: Chelsea plot SHOCK Nkunku swap deal offer
arts.sum: The Spanish outlet claim that Chelsea’s hierarchy are eager to bring Lopez to the club, amid his lack of game time at Barcelona, and Nkunku has reportedly been offered in exchange for the 21-year-old midfielder. Chelsea are eager to include Christopher Nkunku in a swap deal bid to sign Barcelona midfielder Fermin Lopez, according to sensational reports in Spain.

arts.ttl: Chelsea news: Clearlake Capital and Todd Boehly launch NEW transfer policy
arts.sum: The Blues reportedly don’t want to be “disrupted” by stars who are close to leaving the club on a Bosman deal, while they are eager to avoid similar situations to the ones that saw the aforementioned Mount and Gallagher depart Stamford Bridge. According to The Athletic, Chelsea have decided that any first-team or academy player (aged 18 or older) with less than two years remaining on their contract must reach an extension agreement or risk being sold.

arts.ttl: Everton get the keys to stunning new stadium as club takes over Liverpool's Fourth Grace
arts.sum: The club was handed control of the waterfront site during a ceremony on Friday

arts.ttl: "I speak for many" - relief as Everton takeover saga finally ends ahead of stadium move
arts.sum: The Friedkin Group will be the new owners of Everton Football Club after the tekeover was officially sanctioned by the Premier League

arts.ttl: Fiorentina interested in Everton’s Dominic Calvert-Lewin
arts.sum: Serie A side Fiorentina are interested in the possibility of signing Everton striker Dominic Calvert-Lewin. The Toffees striker’s current deal at Goodison Park runs out in the summer of 2024…

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs Everton - Premier League
arts.sum: Predicting how Chelsea could line up for their Premier League clash against Everton on Sunday afternoon.
